name: This is a Robery
description:
During the Rhino activation, he may spend 4 POWER to play this card.

Choose an enemy character within RANGE 1 that is holding Objective token. The chosen character drops any Objetive tokens it is holding. Rhino then Throws the chosen character MEDIUM.

name: Rhino in a China Shop
description:
Rhino may play this chard at the beggining of his Activation.

The next attack Rhino makes this Activation adds dice equal to the combined Size of all terrain features destroyed this Activation.

At the end of this Activation, Rhino suffers 2 WOUND.

name: A-Force Assemble!
description:
An A-Force character may spend 3 POWER to play this card.
When an allied character is defending against an attack this round, add 1 die to the defense roll for each other A-Force character within RANGE 2 of that character.
